results.rendered_html:
sam-pra-√yam P. Ā. -yacchati, ˚te, to offer or present or bestow together (Ā. also, ‘mutually’), give or present to (dat. gen. accord. to  Pāṇ. i, 3, 55  also instr.),  RV.  &c. &c.;
to give in marriage,  MBh. ;
to give back, restore,  R.
